content:
✨ voicebox | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a private, powerful, and versatile local application for voice cloning, speech generation, and audio editing, enabling the creation of voice-powered applications and content.
✨ Key Features: • Local-first voice cloning studio • 5 TTS engines (Qwen3-TTS, LuxTTS, Chatterbox Multilingual, Chatterbox Turbo, HumeAI TADA)
📖 Summary: Voicebox is an open-source, local-first voice synthesis studio that allows users to clone voices, generate speech in multiple languages and TTS engines, apply audio effects, and compose multi-voice projects. It prioritizes user privacy by running entirely on the user's machine and offers a REST API for integration into other applications.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
